name: How to Turn AI Chatbots Into Your Best Referral Source
description: How to Turn AI Chatbots Into Your Best Referral Source - D.C.

step.name: Step 1
step.text: To get referrals from bots like ChatGPT, you have to be more than just a name on a list. You need to be 'cited' as an authority. Focus on publishing deep-dive case studies and unique legal perspectives that AI models scrape for truth. It's about building a digital reputation the bot trusts. Need a hand becoming the AI-recommended authority? That’s what we do best. Let’s talk today.
